title: Highlighted Ores
description: Makes ores INSTANTLY visible in caves! 10x faster! A Hundred downloads and I will do one for the Nether!
body:
Highlighted Ores – Clean Vanilla Highlighted Ores is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that makes ores easier to spot while staying true to the vanilla look. Each ore is outlined with a subtle highlight so it stands out clearly in caves, strip mines, and dark areas—without glowing, shaders, or distracting colors. 

Features 
-Clean, subtle outlines on ore blocks 
-Vanilla-friendly colors (no neon glow) 
-Improves visibility in survival gameplay -Works perfectly with shaders and texture packs 
-FPS-friendly (no models or animations) 
Details Resolution: 
16× Edition: 
Java Performance impact: FPS Boost 

🔹 Why this pack? Perfect for players who want better ore visibility without breaking immersion or turning Minecraft into a PvP texture pack.
